summary: This is a very brief, lighthearted post promoting Stack Overflow Podcast #28. Joel shares a humorous review by a listener named Corey who noted Joel's conversational dominance over co-host Jeff Atwood. Joel playfully taunts Jeff and acknowledges he hasn't been blogging as much because the podcast has become his primary content outlet. He teases the episode's discussion topics with a cryptic reference to colors like Azure and Orange.
key_points: Joel's podcast with Jeff Atwood had become his primary content output, replacing regular blog posts
A listener observed that Joel dominated conversations on the podcast, outpacing Jeff Atwood
The post serves mainly as a promotional pointer to Stack Overflow Podcast episode 28
money_quotes: Jeff just couldn't keep up with the pace of Joel's conversational tennis.
Ha! Take that, Jeff "Atwood," if that's even your real name, you homicidal maniac!
As Corey discovered, the action is all on the podcast.
key_insight: Joel's blogging frequency declined as the Stack Overflow podcast became his primary medium for sharing ideas and engaging with the developer community.
